testcase.name: should return valid for proper running data
should return valid for proper strength data
should return valid for past dates
should return valid for current time
should format pace as MM:SS min/km
should return placeholder for invalid pace
should return empty array when no workouts exist
should save a workout to storage
should delete a workout by id
should only delete the specified workout
should return default values when no workouts exist
should return most recent workout values
should return empty object for other type
should throw error if workout not found
renders card text about logged workouts
renders card title with bold font
renders card text with proper styling
should not render when not visible
should display workout type and date in message
should call onCancel when cancel button pressed
should call onConfirm when delete button pressed
should use destructive styling for delete button
should render distance and duration inputs
should calculate and display pace when valid values entered
should call onDistanceChange when distance input changes
should call onDurationChange when duration input changes
should render reps, sets, and weight inputs
should calculate and display total volume
should display volume with weight when provided
should call onRepsChange when reps input changes
should call onSetsChange when sets input changes
should call onWeightChange when weight input changes
should have accessible labels on all inputs
should have accessibility hints on all inputs
should mark invalid inputs with accessibilityInvalid

testcase.name: should use alert role for error messages
should have accessible labels on buttons
should have accessibility hints on buttons
should have header role on title
should have minimum touch target of 44x44
should have 48px minimum height for inputs
should have proper touch targets for buttons
should complete quick log flow in under 10 seconds (CRITICAL)
should save workout to storage in under 500ms
should maintain UI responsiveness during save
should complete strength workout log in under 10 seconds

Error: Unable to find an element with testID: save-workout-button
<RCTSafeAreaView> <Text> Log Workout </Text> <RCTScrollView testID="workouts-list" > <View> <View> <View> <View testID="workout-type-selector" > <Text> Workout Type </Text> <View> <View accessibilityHint="Select running workout" accessibilityLabel="Running" accessibilityRole="button" accessibilityState={ { "disabled": false, } } accessible={true} testID="type-running" > <Text> <View> <View /> <Text> Running </Text> </View> </Text> </View> <View accessibilityHint="Select squats workout" accessibilityLabel="Squats" accessibilityRole="button" accessibilityState={ { "disabled": false, } } accessible={true} testID="type-squats" > <Text> <View> <View /> <Text> Squats </Text> </View> </Text> </View> <View accessibilityHint="Select push-ups workout" accessibilityLabel="Push-ups" accessibilityRole="button" accessibilityState={ { "disabled": false, } } accessible={true} testID="type-pushups" > <Text> <View> <View /> <Text> Push-ups </Text> </View> </Text> </View> <View accessibilityHint="Select pull-ups workout" accessibilityLabel="Pull-ups" accessibilityRole="button" accessibilityState={ { "disabled": false, } } accessible={true} testID="type-pullups" > <Text> <View> <View /> <Text> Pull-ups </Text> </View> </Text> </View> <View accessibilityHint="Select other workout" accessibilityLabel="Other" accessibilityRole="button" accessibilityState={ { "disabled": false, } } accessible={true} testID="type-other" > <Text> <View> <View /> <Text> Other </Text> </View> </Text> </View> </View> </View> <View> <View testID="datetime-field" > <Text> Date & Time </Text> accessibilityHint="Enter number of squats repetitions" accessibilityLabel="Repetitions" placeholder="e.g., 20" testID="reps-input" value="20" /> </View> <View> <Text> Sets </Text> <TextInput accessibilityHint="Enter number of squats sets" accessibilityLabel="Sets" placeholder="e.g., 3" testID="sets-input" value="3" /> </View> <View> <Text> Weight (kg) - Optional </Text> <TextInput accessibilityHint="Enter weight in kilograms (optional)" accessibilityLabel="Weight" placeholder="e.g., 50 (optional)" testID="weight-input" value="" /> <Text> Leave empty for bodyweight exercises <TextInput accessibilityHint="Optional notes about your workout" accessibilityLabel="Notes" placeholder="Add any additional details..." testID="notes-input" value="" /> </View> <View <Text> Save Workout </Text> </View> </View> </View> <View> <View /> <Text> No workouts yet </Text> <Text> Log your first workout to get started! </Text> </View> </View> </RCTScrollView> clears error when user starts typing
has proper accessibility labels on inputs

testcase.name: provides initial auth state with loading true
provides user as null when not signed in
sets loading to false after initialization
loads auth state from AsyncStorage on mount
handles empty auth state from AsyncStorage
handles invalid auth state from AsyncStorage
signs in with valid email and password
shows generic error for non-existent user
shows generic error for wrong password
creates new user with valid email and password
throws error when useAuth used outside AuthProvider
renders stats card with weekly goal
navigates to Log screen when Run is pressed
navigates to Log screen when Push-up is pressed
navigates to Log screen when Squats is pressed
navigates to Log screen when Pull-up is pressed
renders placeholder message for empty activity list
shows empty state when no workouts exist
allows entering reps for strength workout
allows entering distance for running workout
has proper label for workout type
has proper label for Date & Time
displays current date in Date & Time field
